concept: I'd fancy a turn-based game where you command a troupe of shadow puppeteers whose performances can influence real-world events. Position your puppeteers, light sources, and screens to create shadow plays that enchant audiences while subtly altering the behavior of key spectators. Different cultural contexts require adapting your puppetry techniques to local theatrical traditions to achieve maximum influence. Uncover the ancient connection between shadow manipulation and actual reality warping as your troupe gains notoriety across continents.
